entries.title: Founder / Principal Consultant
bullets: Architected and deployed end-to-end ML forecasting pipelines for equity and fixed-income asset classes, reducing portfolio drawdown by improving signal quality.
Led development of a real-time portfolio optimization engine using mean-CVaR framework, enabling dynamic rebalancing strategies across multi-asset portfolios.
Developed NLP-based sentiment analysis models from earnings call transcripts and news feeds to enrich fundamental factors.
Designed automated performance attribution dashboards presented to CIO-level stakeholders.

entries.title: Quantitative Data Scientist
bullets: Built time series forecasting models (LSTM, Transformer, SARIMA) for macro-economic indicators and commodity price prediction with sub-5% MAPE on out-of-sample data.
Delivered risk factor decomposition using PCA and factor regression, enabling cleaner attribution of returns for a $2B AUM client.
Automated data ingestion and feature engineering pipelines using Airflow and Spark, cutting refresh latency from hours to minutes.
Implemented backtesting frameworks for systematic trading strategies using event-driven simulation.

entries.title: Quantitative Analyst - Research & Strategy
bullets: Developed statistical arbitrage strategies by identifying co-integrated asset pairs across equity markets using Engle-Granger and Johansen tests.
Built scenario-analysis models for stress testing portfolios under historical and Monte Carlo-simulated tail events.
Created advanced analytics reports on market microstructure dynamics, volatility surfaces, and options pricing using Black-Scholes and Heston models.
